title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 99.705 - Assessor to issue current assessed value statement, when
text:
99.705.  Assessor to issue current assessed value statement, when. — Within thirty days of receiving the certificate, the applicant shall notify the city or county assessor, as the case may be, who shall, as soon as possible, issue a statement as to the current assessed valuation of the then existing real property covered by the plans.  The authority shall issue a copy of the plans to the assessor.
(L. 1973 H.B. 63 § 2, A.L. 1979 H.B. 103)
